org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml

Class GraphMLExporter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml.GraphMLExporter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorialExporter

    public class GraphMLExporter
extends Object
implements VectorialExporter
    This class permits to export the graph-model into the GraphMLformat.

    The exporter never exports the figures. Only the graph structure is exported.

    GraphML is a comprehensive and easy-to-use file format for graphs. It consists of a language core to describe the structural properties of a graph and a flexible extension mechanism to add application-specific data.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://graphml.graphdrawing.org/"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      Replies if this exporter is able to create shadows of the vectorials figures.

      Replies if this exporter is able to create a target file inside which all the specifications from ViewGraphics2D were supported.

      Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.

      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

      • isShadowSupported

        public boolean isShadowSupported()
        Replies if this exporter is able to create shadows of the vectorials figures.
        Specified by:
        isShadowSupported in interface VectorialExporter
        Returns:
        true if the exporter is able to create shadows; false if not.

      • isSpecificationCompliant

        public boolean isSpecificationCompliant()
        Replies if this exporter is able to create a target file inside which all the specifications from ViewGraphics2D were supported.
        Specified by:
        isSpecificationCompliant in interface VectorialExporter
        Returns:
        true if the exporter completely support the ViewGraphics2D specifications; false if a part of the specifications are not supported.

      • getFileCollection

        public FileCollection getFileCollection()
        Description copied from interface: VectorialExporter
        Replies the collection of files that is used by this exporter.

        A collection of files may be used by the exporter to create files associated to the file to export.

        Specified by:
        getFileCollection in interface VectorialExporter
        Returns:
        the collection of files, or null if none.

      • setFileCollection

        public void setFileCollection(FileCollection c)
        Description copied from interface: VectorialExporter
        Set the collection of files that is used by this exporter.

        A collection of files may be used by the exporter to create files associated to the file to export.

        Specified by:
        setFileCollection in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        c - is the collection of files, or null if none.

      • write

        public <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(File output,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
        Specified by:
        write in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        output - is the output file
        graph - is the graph to write.
        container - is the container of figures to write.
        Throws:
        IOException
